name: Azevedo Construction
tagline: Sonoma County's kitchen, bath & whole-home remodeling craftsmen since 1992
seoDescription: Azevedo Construction is a Santa Rosa general contractor remodeling kitchens, baths, additions and custom cabinetry across Sonoma County since 1992.

sections.heading: Sonoma County remodels built by hand, since 1992
sections.subheading: Family-run general contracting from Santa Rosa to Sonoma, Healdsburg, Sebastopol and Bodega Bay — kitchens, baths, additions and the custom carpentry most crews won't touch.

sections.heading: About Azevedo Construction
body: Azevedo Construction has been remodeling Sonoma County homes since 1992, run out of Santa Rosa by Ceasar Azevedo and his family. Across more than three decades the team has built a reputation as, in one client's words, "the best kept secret in Sonoma County" — the contractor neighbors quietly pass to one another when they want the job done right.

Ceasar is hands-on and known as a true craftsman, especially for the custom cabinetry and finish carpentry many larger crews skip. Fully licensed and insured, the company handles everything from full kitchen and bathroom remodels to home additions, windows, siding and trim — serving Santa Rosa, Healdsburg, Sebastopol, the City of Sonoma and Bodega Bay.

items.title: Kitchen Remodeling
items.description: Full kitchen remodels — cabinets, counters, layout and finishes — built to fit how your household actually cooks and gathers.

items.title: Bathroom Remodeling
items.description: Complete bath renovations from tile and vanities to full reconfigurations, finished with the same care as the rest of your home.

items.title: Custom Cabinetry & Carpentry
items.description: Built-to-order cabinets and finish carpentry from a contractor clients call a true craftsman — the detailed work most crews won't take on.

items.title: Home Additions
items.description: Adding square footage and rooms that match your existing home, handled start to finish by one accountable, licensed team.

items.title: Windows & Siding
items.description: New windows and siding to update curb appeal, weather-tightness and efficiency across older Sonoma County homes.

items.title: Trim & Finish Work
items.description: Interior trim, moldings and detail carpentry that give a remodel its polished, finished feel.

items.title: Reach out
items.body: Call or message Azevedo Construction and tell us what you need.

items.title: We assess
items.body: We look at the details and talk through the right approach with you.

items.title: We do the work
items.body: Our team handles it properly, keeping you in the loop along the way.

items.title: You’re set
items.body: The job’s done right, and we stand behind it.

items.title: Licensed General Contractor Since 1992
items.body: Properly credentialed, so the work is covered and done to standard.

items.title: Family-Owned, Santa Rosa Based
items.body: Rooted right here in Santa Rosa, CA, with a real stake in doing it right.

items.title: Kitchen & Bath Remodeling Specialists
items.body: A standard we hold on every job, not just the easy ones.

items.title: Custom Cabinetry & Finish Carpentry
items.body: A standard we hold on every job, not just the easy ones.

items.title: 5.0-Star Rated, Free Estimates
items.body: Clear, honest pricing up front — no surprises on the final bill.

items.title: Serving All Of Sonoma County
items.body: A standard we hold on every job, not just the easy ones.

items.quote: Caesar built a custom cabinet for our dressing area and did an amazing job — a true craftsman that is hard to find these days.
items.author: Custom cabinetry client

items.quote: Ceasar and his team are truly the best kept secret in Sonoma County.
items.author: Sonoma County homeowner

items.quote: Friendly, honest and fair — does professional quality work and is very aware of his surroundings in the house and with pets.
items.author: Remodel client

sections.heading: Work with Azevedo Construction
sections.body: Find us at 625 Nathan Ln. Call (707) 396-1083 — we’re glad to help.
